strict_rule: AI MUST NEVER INVENT PRICES. If a price is missing, return NEEDS_PRICING_REVIEW.

b2c_end_user.display_rule: All customer-facing retail prices include German VAT. Display price is the final amount the customer pays.

b2b_dealer_wholesale.invoice_rule: Dealer/wholesale prices exclude VAT. VAT is added on the invoice.

commission.rule: Commission is calculated from the netto selling price, never from brutto VAT-inclusive retail price.

validation_rules: Every active product must have Product ID, SKU, Product Name, and at least one valid retail or dealer price.
Retail Price Brutto EUR must equal Retail Price Netto EUR * 1.19 within rounding tolerance when both are present.
B2B prices must be treated as netto only.
Do not auto-generate offers, discounts, coupons, bundles, or margins unless they exist in an approved pricing/offers file.
Products with Status = Needs Review must be shown as review-required before production publishing.
